figures.caption: Figure 1: Chain of Operators (Chop). A frozen in-context operator network (Icon) is wrapped by a discovered prompt-side operator F = Fm◦· · ·◦F1 and prediction-side operator G = Gr◦· · ·◦G1, forming the chain F → Icon → G. Given an in-context prompt of demonstration pairs C = {(xi, yi)}Di=1 and a query x∗, F rewrites the prompt toward the regime where the frozen Icon model is reliable, Icon predicts, and G returns the result to the original output space ŷ∗.
Table 1: Single-step relative L2 error on three out-of-distribution flux functions. Reduction reports the mean relative decrease from Raw Icon to Chop across queries.
Figure 3: Ten-step autoregressive rollout error on three out-of-distribution flux functions.
Table 3: Mean rel-L2 error on the 15 OOD MFC operator tasks. The dagger marks the evolution task.
Figure 4: Relative L2 error across input length scales ℓ ∈ {0.5, 0.3, 0.1} for the five MFC operators.
Figure 5: g-parameter operator (1, 1) across input length scales ℓ ∈ {0.5, 0.3, 0.1}.
Table 4: Residual transfer operator applied alone to the ρ-parameter tasks.
Figure 6: MFC spacetime prediction results at input length scale ℓ = 0.5.
Figure 7: Residual transfer on the ρ-parameter operator (1, 2) across input length scales ℓ ∈ {0.5, 0.3, 0.1}.
Figure 8: Additional spacetime MFC predictions for the g-parameter operator (1, 2), ρ0(x) 7→ ρ[T/2,T ](t, x). Each length scale is illustrated with two examples.
Figure 9: Additional spacetime MFC predictions for the g-parameter operator (2, 2), ρ[0,T/2](t, x) 7→ ρ[T/2,T ](t, x). Each length scale is illustrated with two examples.

Figure 10: Additional residual-transfer predictions for the ρ-parameter operator (1, 1), g(x) 7→ ρT (x). The reduced chain Icon→Gres is evaluated at ℓ = 0.3 and ℓ = 0.1, with two examples for each length scale.

Figure 11: Additional residual-transfer predictions for the ρ-parameter operator (1, 2), g(x) 7→ ρ[T/2,T ](t, x). The reduced chain Icon → Gres is evaluated at ℓ = 0.3 and ℓ = 0.1, with two examples for each length scale.
Figure 12: Ten-step autoregressive rollout for the MFC chain transferred to the conservation-law.
